globalNews.title: Marine Le Pen found guilty, but court clears way for presidential run if she wears tag
globalNews.summary: The National Rally leader now has to decide whether she will run with an electronic tag and will speak on TV later.

globalNews.title: Zelensky presses Nato for air defence systems after intense Russian strikes
globalNews.summary: The Ukrainian president says "decisions for air defence" should be "one of the key outcomes" of this week's summit in Turkey.

globalNews.title: Woman suspected of Monaco bomb attack found dead in Ukraine
globalNews.summary: Police had been hunting Anastasiia Berezovska after a Ukrainian millionaire was injured in the blast.

globalNews.title: Jailers and officials at Russia's 'torture prisons' in Ukraine exposed by BBC
globalNews.summary: Former prisoners accuse the men of abuse in detention centres and want to see them brought to trial.

globalNews.title: Explosions injure 18 in Damascus during Macron's visit
globalNews.summary: As reports of the blasts came in, state television said the Syrian president had welcomed Macron at the presidential palace.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin bulls battle for $63K as Micron stock eyes 10% drop in US chip sell-off
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin came off two-week highs while US stocks dipped and John Bollinger described BTC price action as "at a critical point."

cryptoNews.title: How Onchain Capital Can Reach Europe’s Underserved SMEs
cryptoNews.summary: Novel models for RWA tokenization could allow SMEs to receive credit using tangible assets as collateral. A new Cointelegraph Research report presents a case study.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin Covenants Part 3: SIGHASH_ANYPREVOUT
cryptoNews.summary: APO lets a Bitcoin signature authorize any compatible UTXO rather than one fixed outpoint. It allows for rebindable pre-signed transactions for Lightning, vaults, and layer-2 protocols without new key

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Has Bitcoin bottomed for this cycle? Analysts say 'not yet'
cryptoNews.summary: Some Bitcoin analysts point to a deeper downside risk, while others believes they can see the early signs of a recovery.

aiNews.title: Savi’s app aims to protect consumers from realistic AI scams like kidnappers demanding ransom
aiNews.summary: The company just raised $7 million in seed funding, and is launching its app for iPhone and Android on Tuesday.

aiNews.title: The first American autonomous ground vehicles are fighting in Ukraine
aiNews.summary: Forterra has deployed more than 100 of its self-driving ATVs in conflict zones in Ukraine.

aiNews.title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
aiNews.summary: An AI agent carried out the technical execution of a real-world ransomware attack for the first known time, but new details show a human still chose the victim, set up the infrastructure, and supplied

aiNews.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
aiNews.summary: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.

aiNews.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch on the fight to split off models from agents
aiNews.summary: "The reality is, when you're optimizing for production, you start looking at a price/performance," Guillermo Rauch tells TechCrunch.
